News.Title: TownOfExtra v1.2.0
Text: TownOfExtra has updated to v1.2.0
Thank you for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://discord.gg/y2GN5Q4fzb>Join Discord</link> ★ <link=https://github.com/Mehzxzz/TownOfExtra/wiki>Role/Modifier Info</link> ★
<size=105%>New Roles:</size>
- A new Impostor Power role has been added: Dream Caster
- A new Neutral Outlier role has been added: Poltergeist
<size=105%>New Icons:</size>
- New Role Icons have been added for: Conjurer, Eraser, Chief, Vulture
- New Modifier Icons have been added for: Heavy Workload
- New Button Icons have been added for: Chain
<size=105%>Bugfixes:</size>
- Fixed trickster's name showing on the body screen when a real body is reported
- Fixed vinculator's chain menu being openable while already open
- Fixed signal jammer getting people stuck in a wierd softlocked state
- Fixed chief acting like people are shot even when shielded
- Fixed gambler not working for non host
- Fixed eraser not erasing the target's roles
<size=105%>Changes:</size>
- Tou: Mira's cleric role can now cleanse ToEx's bad effects
- Added new icons for some roles special effects: Switcher, Chief, Eraser, Tagger
- Removed the no body gambler effect

News.Title: TownOfExtra v1.2.0
News.SubTitle: Hotfix #1
Text: TownOfExtra has been hotfixed to Hotfix #1 [1.2.0]
Thank you for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://discord.gg/y2GN5Q4fzb>Join Discord</link> ★ <link=https://github.com/Mehzxzz/TownOfExtra/wiki>Role/Modifier Info</link> ★
<size=105%>Bugfixes:</size>
- Fixed poltergeist's possess button sometimes not ending the game when it should.
- Fixed eraser not working for non host
- Fixed gambler sometimes giving all effects and crashing servers
<size=105%>Changes:</size>
- Removed eraser marking already erased players
- Added colour to the reactor credit cuz other mods did and i like colour
- Added mod icon to news menu

News.Title: TownOfExtra v1.2.1
Text: TownOfExtra has updated to v1.2.1
Thank you for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://discord.gg/y2GN5Q4fzb>Join Discord</link> ★ <link=https://github.com/Mehzxzz/TownOfExtra/wiki>Role/Modifier Info</link> ★
<size=105%>New Roles:</size>
- A new Impostor Killing role has been added: Striker
- A new Crewmate Power role has been added: Journalist
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- Added an option to disable assasin modifier for the eraser
- Using basic crew colours will now use basic crew colours on role/button icons
<size=105%>Changes:</size>
- Changed poltergeist from Neutral Outlier > Neutral Evil
- Eraser now only marks full erased players (not just pending)
- Updated most role icons to use a higher resolution (for better image quality)
<size=105%>Bugfixes:</size>
- Conjurer can no longer drop rocks while dead
- Switcher can now change target after selecting
- Switcher now actually is given the target's role
- Fixed some notifications not being sent
- Fixed eraser being able to re-erase erased players
- Fixed eraser, chief & switcher not working properly on imitator
- Fixed basic crew colours not applying until the game is restarted
- Fixed mod icon showing on the normal game news
<size=105%>New Icons:</size>
- Added new button icons for: Cast
- Added new placeholder button icons for: Protect, Info, Attack, Misc (you will probably never see these unless i forget to remove uses)

News.Title: Modifiers Galore! [v1.2.2]
News.SubTitle: 6 modifiers, 2 roles & lots of bugfixes to go along with them!
Text: TownOfExtra has updated to v1.2.2
Thank you for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://discord.gg/y2GN5Q4fzb>Join Discord</link> ★ <link=https://github.com/Mehzxzz/TownOfExtra/wiki>Role/Modifier Info</link> ★
<size=105%>New Roles:</size>
- A new Neutral Killing role has been added: Squid
- A new Neutral Killing role has been added: Shadow Walker
<size=105%>New Modifiers:</size>
- A new Universal Passive modifier has been added: Apolitical
- A new Universal Passive modifier has been added: Mute
- A new Crewmate Passive modifier has been added: Observant
- A new Crewmate Passive modifier has been added: Clumsy
- A new Impostor Utility modifier has been added: Shockwave
- A new Impostor Passive modifier has been added: Rebirth
<size=105%>Changes:</size>
- Cannibal is now a Neutral Killing role
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- Added an option to let chief spread its egotism
<size=105%>Bugfixes:</size>
- Fixed the death messages for striker having missing strings
- Fixed conjurer's cooldown using the duration
- Fixed journalist's chat showing even without an interviewee
- Fixed modifier selection screen breaking in freeplay
- Fixed striker kills not being counted as the striker's
- Fixed striker locate results having repeats & roles it shouldn't
- Fixed eraser turning neutrals into crew, added a setting for their new roles
- Fixed a spelling issue in striker's custom intro blurb
- Fixed all notifications not showing due to incorrect file paths
- Ghosts are now alerted when a signal jam or freeze happens
- Fixed chief being able to recruit already recruited players
<size=105%>New Icons:</size>
- Added a new button icon for tagger's mark ability (by @maybe_xinav [discord])
- Added a new role icon for trickster (by @mystic_haze2 [discord])

News.Title: TownOfExtra v1.2.3
Text: TownOfExtra has updated to v1.2.3
Thank you for playing the mod!
★ <link=https://discord.gg/y2GN5Q4fzb>Join Discord</link> ★ <link=https://github.com/Mehzxzz/TownOfExtra/wiki>Role/Modifier Info</link> ★
<size=105%>New Roles:</size>
- A new Neutral Killing role has been added: Barbarian
- A new Crewmate Killing role has been added: Commander
<size=105%>New Modifiers:</size>
- A new Crewmate Utility modifier has been added: Panic Shield
<size=105%>Additions:</size>
- Added options for cannibal, squid & shadow walker to be able to vent
- Poltergeist now applies permanent debuffs to scared & possessed players
- Added new status effect timers below player names when they have some status effects
<size=105%>Changes:</size>
- Switcher has been renamed & rebranded under the name Shifter (to fit with other popular mods)
- The Fragile modifier has been renamed to Brittle
<size=105%>Bugfixes:</size>
- Fixed rebirth breaking on death
- Fixed the death messages for striker having missing strings (again)
- Fixed squid not being able to kill
- Fixed squid showing incorrect wiki ability entries
- Fixed squid's spill not starting when ink is slipped on
- Fixed shifter (formally switcher) being guessable
- Fixed squid bugging out some role button's cooldowns
- Fixed some neutrals not being able to get ghost roles
- Finally fixed neutrals being able to do tasks, when they shouldn't (ty @divaninl [discord]/divani mods for the code)
- Fixed routine being a guessable modifier
- Fixed most role buttons being treated as kill buttons, therefore triggering things like mirrorcaster
- Fixed shifter slightly bugging when trying to shift with their current target again
- Fixed striker killing someone after they already die during impending doom
- Fixed chief showing shot player's roles & recruits between rounds
- Fixed chief showing shot player's roles when the kill failed due to a shield
- Shifter now obtains crewpostor, egotist & imitator properly
